imageAlt: SC: reduce disengaged churn roadmap item preview image
title: SC: reduce disengaged churn
summaryBody: We aim to reduce the SCU auto-churn rate (smart capture unlimited customers who we return due to low usage) by extending the disengaged period from 6 to 13 months to better accommodate the seasonal and annual usage patterns we see in many of our subscribers.
detailBody: We aim to reduce the SCU auto-churn rate (smart capture unlimited customers who we return due to low usage) by extending the disengaged period from 6 to 13 months to better accommodate the seasonal and annual usage patterns we see in many of our subscribers.
